stages.concept:
# Unit 081: 접속사 (시간) before, after, until, since - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 시간을 나타내는 접속사 **before, after, until, since**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **before** — ~하기 전에

> Wash your hands **before** you eat.
> 먹기 전에 손을 씻어라.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **after** — ~한 후에

> I will go home **after** I finish my work.
> 나는 일을 끝낸 후에 집에 갈 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **until (= till)** — ~할 때까지

> I will wait **until** you come back.
> 나는 네가 돌아올 때까지 기다릴 것이다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 의미에 맞게 빈칸을 채우세요.**
"Please wait here (       ) the bus arrives." (버스가 도착할 때까지 여기서 기다려 주세요.)
1. before
2. after
3. until ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: **since** — ~한 이래로, ~이후로

> I have lived here **since** I was born.
> 나는 태어난 이래로 여기에서 살아왔다.

> She has been happy **since** she got the job.
> 그녀는 직장을 얻은 이후로 행복해왔다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: before(전에), after(후에), until(까지), since(이후로)! 시간 접속사 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 081: 접속사(시간) before, after, until, since - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
(     ) I closed the file, I saved it.
> **정답** Before

---

**02.** She went home ? she finished her homework.
> **정답** after

---

**03.** I will wait ? you come back.
> **정답** until

---

**04.** ? he moved here, he has made many friends.
> **정답** Since

---

**05.** Wash your hands ? you eat dinner.
> **정답** before

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I went home before I finished my work.
(일을 끝낸 후에 집에 갔다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** before → after

---

**07.** She has been happy after she moved to Seoul.
(이사한 이래로)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** after → since

---

**08.** I will stay after the rain stops.
(비가 그칠 때까지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** after → until

---

**09.** Brush your teeth since you go to bed.
(자기 전에)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** since → before

---

**10.** Until she ate lunch, she went to the park.
(점심을 먹은 후에)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Until → After

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
숙제를 하기 전에 간식을 먹어라.
Eat a snack you do your homework.
> **정답** before

---

**12.** 수업이 끝난 후에 집에 갔다.
I went home class ended.
> **정답** after

---

**13.** 엄마가 올 때까지 기다려라.
Wait your mom comes.
> **정답** until

---

**14.** 그가 떠난 이래로 나는 그를 보지 못했다.
he left, I haven't seen him.
> **정답** Since

---

**15.** 잠자기 전에 이를 닦아라.
Brush your teeth you go to bed.
> **정답** before

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 저녁을 먹은 후에 산책했다.
She took a walk after she ate dinner
> **정답** She / took / a / walk / after / she / ate / dinner

---

**17.** 나는 네가 돌아올 때까지 여기 있을게.
will I stay here until come you back
> **정답** I / will / stay / here / until / you / come / back

---

**18.** 학교에 가기 전에 아침을 먹어라.
Eat breakfast before go you to school
> **정답** Eat / breakfast / before / you / go / to / school

---

**19.** 그가 이사한 이래로 우리는 연락하지 못했다.
Since moved he we haven't been in touch
> **정답** Since / he / moved / we / haven't / been / in / touch

---

**20.** 시험이 끝난 후에 놀자.
play Let's after the test is over
> **정답** Let's / play / after / the / test / is / over
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 081: 접속사(시간) before, after, until, since - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
It has been a long time _______ we met.
since
until
before
and
> **정답** since

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Turn off the light ________ you leave the room.
or
until
before
but
> **정답** before

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I will be a lawyer _______ I graduate from college.
_______ you read the book, you have to put it in
place.
before
and
after
so
> **정답** after

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I haven't seen them ________ they went abroad.
We will play soccer _______ it rains.
since - until
since - but
before - until
before - while
> **정답** since - until

---

**05.** 다음 중 빈 칸에 until이 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
___________ he arrived at the hotel, Mr. Kim
went straight to the reception desk.
I go to bed __________ I take a shower.
I will go to bed __________ I brush my teeth.
Wait here __________ I come back.
• reception desk 호텔의 접수처(프런트)
> **정답** Wait here __________ I come back.

---

**06.** 다음 중 빈 칸에 after 가 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
Please fill in the form ________ you submit it.
The garden was a mess _________ the
typhoon passed by.
Check the spelling ____________ you submit
the essay.
Tom always sets his alarm clock ________ he
goes to bed.
> **정답** The garden was a mess _________ the typhoon
passed by.

---

**07.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 런던으로 여행을 떠나기 전에 완벽하게 계획을 세웠다.
He made a perfect plan after he left for
London.
He made a perfect plan until he left for
London.
He made a perfect plan since he left for
London.
He made a perfect plan before he left for
London.
> **정답** He made a perfect plan before he left for London.

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
눈이 그칠 때까지 우리는 집에 머물렀다.
We stayed at home after the snow stopped.
We stayed at home since the snow stopped.
We stayed at home until the snow stopped.
We stayed at home before the snow stopped.
> **정답** We stayed at home until the snow stopped.

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
편지를 받은 후 그는 너의 질문에 답장을 할 것이다.
He receives the letter, after he will reply your
questions.
After he received the letter, he will reply your
questions.
He receives the letter, after he replies your
questions.
After he receives the letter, he will reply your
questions.
> **정답** After he receives the letter, he will reply your
questions.

---

**10.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
He hasn't worn the hat ________ he bought it.
________ he reviewed the report, he submitted it.
since - until
before - after
and - but
since - after
> **정답** since - after

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I will wait here until the rain ___________.
She will stay at home until the test results
_____________. 
stops - come out
will stop - will come out
stop - come out
stops - comes out
> **정답** stops - come out

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Warm up after you jump into the sea.
After you take your medicine, drink plenty of
water.
We will clean up the room before my mom
arrives.
Focus on your class untill it's over.
> **정답** Warm up after you jump into the sea.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
We must protect the environment before it
becomes polluted.
The sun rose and it became morning.
Until he finished his studies, he went to
America.
He didn't arrive at school until the class
started.
> **정답** Until he finished his studies, he went to America.

---

**14.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He listened to music ________ he fell asleep.
People used cash _______ credit cards appeared.
since
until
so
but
> **정답** until

---

**15.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 만든 것 중 알맞은 것을 모두
고르시오. [2개]
He went to bed.
He took a shower.
He went to bed after he took a shower.
He took a shower until he went to bed.
He went to bed until he took a shower.
He took a shower before he went to bed.
> **정답** He went to bed after he took a shower., He took a
shower before he went to bed.

---

**16.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
그는 서명하기 전에 문서를 주의 깊게 읽었다.
He read the document carefully ________ he signed
it.
until
after
since
before
> **정답** before

---

**17.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
Tom이 골을 넣은 후 그 팀은 자축했다.
The team celebrated _______ Tom scored a goal.
since
before
until
after
> **정답** after

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Amy will do her best until
she will achieve her goal.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
• achieve 성취하다
> **정답** will achieve → achieves

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom will practice baseball
before his mother will prepare
dinner.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will prepare → prepares

---

**20.** 다음 중 잘못된 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
그는 경기가 시작되기 전에 매우 긴장했다.
He was very nervous after the game began.
→ He was very nervous
.
> **정답** before the game began
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 081 접속사(시간) before, after, until, since중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 빈칸에 주어진 접속사 중 알맞은 것을 골라 써 넣으시오.
until, after
She quietly left the room  (     )  the baby fell asleep.
정답 after

---

**02.** 빈칸에 주어진 접속사 중 알맞은 것을 골라 써 넣으시오.
since, until
Monica couldn't sleep  (     )  the morning came.
정답 until

---

**03.** 주어진 두 문장을 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 알맞은 접속사를
사용하여 한 문장으로 만드시오.
You should wash your hands.
You have a meal.
너는 밥을 먹기 전에 손을 씻어야 한다.
정답 You should wash your hands before you have a meal.
(Before you have a meal, you should wash your
hands.)

---

**04.** 주어진 두 문장을 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 알맞은 접속사를
사용하여 한 문장으로 만드시오.
He waved his hand.
The train started.
그는 기차가 출발할 때까지 계속 손을 흔들었다.
정답 He waved his hand until the train started. (Until the
train started, he waved his hand.)

---

**05.** 다음 대화문에서 주어진 접속사 중 하나를 사용하여
문장을 완성하시오.
before, since
A: You must not cross the crosswalk  (     )  the traffic
light turns green.
B: Okay, Mom.
정답 before

---

**06.** 다음 대화문에서 주어진 접속사 중 하나를 사용하여
문장을 완성하시오.
after, before
A: Did you warm up before swimming?
B: Yes, I'm swimming  (     )  I warmed up.
정답 after

---

**07.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 알맞은 접속사와 괄호 안의
말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
Jerry가 경기에 참가한 이후 사람들의 관심이 집중됐다.
힌트 (     ) participate in the game
People have paid attention to the game 
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 since, Jerry, participated, in, the, game

---

**08.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 알맞은 접속사를 쓰시오.
비가 그칠때까지 우리는 기다릴 것이다.
We will wait  (     )  the rain stops.
정답 until

---

**09.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 알맞은 접속사를 쓰시오.
우리는 점심을 먹은 이후로 아무것도 먹지 못했다.
We haven't eaten anything  (     )  we had lunch.
정답 since

---

**10.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 알맞은 접속사를 쓰시오.
그녀는 영화가 시작하기 전에 핸드폰을 껐어요.
She turned off her cell phone  (     )  the movie
started.
정답 before

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 081: 접속사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
It has been a long time _______ we talked. since until before and
> 정답: since

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Turn off the heater ________ you leave the house. or until before but
> 정답: before

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I will be a scientist _______ I graduate from college.
_______ you finish the book, you have to return it to the shelf. before and after so
> 정답: after

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I haven't seen her ________ she moved away.
We will study _______ the bell rings. since - until since - but before - until before - while
> 정답: since - until

---

**05.** 다음 중 빈 칸에 until이 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
___________ he arrived at the school, Tom went straight to the classroom.
I go to bed __________ I take a bath.
I will go to bed __________ I brush my teeth.
Wait here __________ I come back.
> 정답: Wait here __________ I come back.

---

**06.** 다음 중 빈 칸에 after 가 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
Please check the list ________ you submit it.
The yard was a mess _________ the storm passed by.
Review the answers ____________ you hand in the test.
Tom always sets his alarm clock ________ he goes to bed.
> 정답: The yard was a mess _________ the storm

---

**07.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 파리로 여행을 떠나기 전에 완벽하게 계획을 세웠다.
He made a perfect plan after he left for Paris.
He made a perfect plan until he left for Paris.
He made a perfect plan since he left for Paris.
He made a perfect plan before he left for Paris.
> 정답: He made a perfect plan before he left for Paris.

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
비가 그칠 때까지 우리는 집에 머물렀다.
We stayed at home after the rain stopped.
We stayed at home since the rain stopped.
We stayed at home until the rain stopped.
We stayed at home before the rain stopped.
> 정답: We stayed at home until the rain stopped.

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
메시지를 받은 후 그녀는 너의 질문에 답장을 할 것이다.
She receives the message, after she will reply your questions.
After she received the message, she will reply your questions.
She receives the message, after she replies your questions.
After she receives the message, she will reply your questions.
> 정답: After she receives the message, she will reply your

---

**10.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
He hasn't worn the jacket ________ he bought it.
________ she reviewed the essay, she submitted it. since - until before - after and - but since - after
> 정답: since - after

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I will wait here until the snow ___________.
She will stay at home until the exam results _____________.
stops - come out will stop - will come out stop - come out stops - comes out
> 정답: stops - come out

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Warm up after you jump into the pool.
After you take your vitamin, drink plenty of water.
We will tidy up the room before my dad arrives.
Focus on your lesson until it's over.
> 정답: Warm up after you jump into the pool.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
We must protect the forest before it becomes damaged.
The sun rose and it became bright.
Until he finished his training, he went to the city.
He didn't arrive at school until the lesson started.
> 정답: Until he finished his training, he went to the city.

---

**14.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He listened to music ________ he fell asleep.
People used letters _______ emails appeared. since until so but
> 정답: until

---

**15.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 만든 것 중 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
He went to bed.
He took a bath.
He went to bed after he took a bath.
He took a bath until he went to bed.
He went to bed until he took a bath.
He took a bath before he went to bed.
> 정답: He went to bed after he took a bath., He took a

---

**16.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
그녀는 서명하기 전에 계약서를 주의 깊게 읽었다.
She read the contract carefully ________ she signed it. until after since before
> 정답: before

---

**17.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
Tom이 골을 넣은 후 그 팀은 자축했다.
The team celebrated _______ Tom scored a goal. since before until after
> 정답: after

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Amy  will  do  her  best  until she  will  reach  her  goal. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: will reach → reaches

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Tom  will  practice  basketball before  his  father  will  prepare dinner. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: will prepare → prepares

---

**20.** 다음 중 잘못된 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
그녀는 경기가 시작되기 전에 매우 긴장했다.
She was very nervous after the match began. → She was very nervous .
> 정답: before the match began
